problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Attention mechanism with linear complexity may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
